provisions.content:
SEEDS OF AGRICULTURAL PLANTS AND VEGETABLES

[ L.S. 433.30

LEĠISLAZZJONI SUSSIDJARJA 433.30
REGOLAMENTI DWAR SEEDS OF AGRICULTURAL
PLANTS AND VEGETABLES
3 ta’ Jannar 2018
L-AVVIŻ LEGALI 2 tal-2018,kif emendat bl-Avviż Legali 5 tal-2019 u
88, 331, 422 tal-2020, 366 u 507 tal-2021, 127 tal-2022 u 95 tal-2025.

*Dawn ir-Regolamenti ġew ippubblikati bl-ilsien Ingliż biss.

1
